title: Exclusion for ESOPs
text: outstanding options granted to employees, whether currently an employee or not, pursuant to an employee stock option scheme in compliance with the Companies Act, 2013, the relevant Guidance Note or accounting standards, if any, issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or pursuant to the Companies Act, 2013, in this regard;

source.span_hint: outstanding options granted

title: Exclusion for SARs (fully exercised)
text: outstanding stock appreciation rights granted to employees pursuant to a stock appreciation right scheme, which are fully exercised for equity shares prior to the filing of the red herring prospectus (in case of book-built issues) or the prospectus (in case of fixed price issues), as the case may be, disclosures regarding such stock appreciation rights and the scheme and the total number of equity shares resulting from the exercise of such rights are made in the draft offer document and offer document.

source.span_hint: outstanding stock appreciation rights

title: Exclusion for fully paid-up convertibles (pre-filing conversion)
text: fully paid-up outstanding convertible securities which are required to be converted on or before the date of filing of the red herring prospectus (in case of book-built issues) or the prospectus (in case of fixed price issues), as the case may be.

source.span_hint: fully paid-up outstanding

title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 crore (last 3 years)
text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets: Provided that if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project; Provided further that the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.

source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets

title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 crore (last 3 years)
text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years;

source.span_hint: it has an average operating profit

title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 crore (last 3 years)
text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis;

source.span_hint: it has a net worth

title: Revenue from new name activity ≥ 50% (last year)
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.

source.span_hint: if it has changed its name

title: Name change and revenue condition
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.

source.span_hint: if it has changed its name within

title: Eligibility for IPO through book-building process
text: An issuer not satisfying the condition stipulated in sub-regulation (1) shall be eligible to make an initial public offer only if the issue is made through the book-building process and the issuer undertakes to allot at least seventy five per cent. of the net offer to qualified institutional buyers and to refund the full subscription money if it fails to do so.
notes: Map to IPO_process_type, allocation_to_QIBs, and refund_policy.

source.span_hint: An issuer not satisfying the condition

title: Technology-intensive SR equity shares issuance
text: the issuer shall be intensive in the use of technology, information technology, intellectual property, data analytics, bio-technology or nano-technology to provide products, services or business platforms with substantial value addition.

source.span_hint: the issuer shall be intensive in the use of

title: Net worth condition for SR shareholders
text: the net worth of the SR shareholder, as determined by a Registered Valuer, shall not be more than rupees one thousand crore.

source.span_hint: the net worth of the SR shareholder

title: SR shares issuance to promoters/founders
text: The SR shares were issued only to the promoters/ founders who hold an executive position in the issuer company;

source.span_hint: The SR shares were issued only

title: Authorization of SR equity shares issuance (size)
text: the size of issue of SR equity shares,

source.span_hint: the size of issue of SR equity shares

title: Authorization of SR equity shares issuance (voting rights)
text: ratio of voting rights of SR equity shares vis-à-vis the ordinary shares,

source.span_hint: ratio of voting rights of SR equity shares

title: Authorization of SR equity shares issuance (dividends)
text: rights as to differential dividends, if any

source.span_hint: rights as to differential dividends

title: Authorization of SR equity shares issuance (sunset provisions)
text: sunset provisions, which provide for a time frame for the validity of such SR equity shares,

source.span_hint: sunset provisions, which provide for a time frame

title: Authorization of SR equity shares issuance (voting rights equality)
text: matters in respect of which the SR equity shares would have the same voting right as that of the ordinary shares,

source.span_hint: matters in respect of which the SR equity shares

title: Holding period for SR equity shares before IPO filing
text: the SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing of draft red herring prospectus and held for a period of at least three months prior to the filing of the red herring prospectus;

source.span_hint: the SR equity shares have been issued prior

title: Voting rights ratio for SR equity shares
text: The SR equity shares shall have voting rights in the ratio of a minimum of 2:1 upto a maximum of 10:1 compared to ordinary shares and such ratio shall be in whole numbers only;

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall have voting rights

title: Face value of SR equity shares
text: The SR equity shares shall have the same face value as the ordinary shares;

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall have the same face value

title: Single class of SR equity shares
text: The issuer shall only have one class of SR equity shares;

source.span_hint: The issuer shall only have one class of

title: Equivalence to ordinary shares except voting rights
text: The SR equity shares shall be equivalent to ordinary equity shares in all respects, except for having superior voting rights.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall be equivalent

title: Application for in-principle approval to stock exchanges
text: An issuer making an initial public offer shall ensure that it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges to seek an in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchanges and has chosen one of them as the designated stock exchange, in terms of Schedule XIX;

source.span_hint: application to one or more stock exchanges

title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
text: An issuer making an initial public offer shall ensure that it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;

source.span_hint: entered into an agreement with a depository

title: Promoters' securities in dematerialised form
text: An issuer making an initial public offer shall ensure that all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document;

source.span_hint: all its specified securities held by the promoters

title: Partly paid-up equity shares fully paid-up or forfeited
text: An issuer making an initial public offer shall ensure that all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited;

source.span_hint: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares

title: Firm arrangements for finance towards project funding
text: An issuer making an initial public offer shall ensure that it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals.

source.span_hint: made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means

title: Limit on amount for general corporate purposes
text: The amount for general corporate purposes, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.

source.span_hint: amount for general corporate purposes
